title: Odyssey, Book 7: The Palace of Alcinous
description: Book 7 of Homer's Odyssey: The Palace of Alcinous.
introduction: Book 7 of the Odyssey: The Palace of Alcinous. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Ὣς ὁ μὲν ἔνθ᾿ ἠρᾶτο πολύτλας δῖος Ὀδυσσεύς.
translation.text: Odysseus entered the palace of Alcinous, shrouded in mist by Athena. He clasped the knees of Queen Arete and begged for passage home. The king welcomed him, offered him his daughter in marriage, and promised to send him home by ship.
